since_last: 36% of 86 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +0.42%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 36% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.08% · BTC -4.93% · Gold -2.66% · Nasdaq100 -0.66%. 36% of 86 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +0.42%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.42%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -2.24%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SMR is the standout at -6.45%
cards.body: Leaders: UPST +4.42%, ZBRA +3.81%, PUBM +3.48%, INTU +3.41%, WDAY +3.10%. Laggards: SMR -6.45%, OKLO -5.79%, OKLO -5.79%, MDB -5.56%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.33% at $155.59
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.33% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
